items.original_text: We propose pre-finetuning, an additional large-scale learning stage between language model pre-training and fine-tuning. Pre-finetuning is massively multi-task learning (around 50 datasets, over 4.8 million total labeled examples), and is designed to encourage learning of representations that generalize better to many different tasks.
items.claim_text: 提出pre-finetuning：在预训练和微调之间增加大规模多任务学习阶段，使用约50个数据集、480万标注样本，学习更好泛化的表示 [EV-001]

items.original_text: We show that pre-finetuning consistently improves performance for pretrained discriminators (e.g. RoBERTa) and generation models (e.g. BART) on a wide range of tasks.
items.claim_text: pre-finetuning一致地提升预训练判别模型（RoBERTa）和生成模型（BART）在广泛任务上的性能 [EV-002]

items.original_text: We also show that large-scale multi-tasking is crucial; pre-finetuning can hurt performance when few tasks are used up until a critical point (usually above 15) after which performance improves linearly in the number of tasks.
items.claim_text: 大规模多任务至关重要；任务数少于临界点（通常15个）时pre-finetuning可能损害性能，超过后性能随任务数线性提升 [EV-003]

items.original_text: We introduce a new training scheme which uses loss scaling and task-heterogeneous batches so that gradient steps are more evenly balanced across multiple different competing tasks, greatly improving training stability and overall performance.
items.claim_text: 新训练方案：损失缩放+任务异构批次，使梯度步骤更平衡，大幅提升训练稳定性和整体性能 [EV-004]

items.original_text: Classification 26 datasets 2.9M train; Summarization 4 datasets 524K train; MRC 6 datasets 1.05M train; CommonSense 10 datasets 360K train; Total 46 datasets 4.8M train.
items.claim_text: 任务分布：分类26数据集2.9M、摘要4数据集524K、MRC 6数据集1.05M、常识10数据集360K，总计46数据集4.8M训练样本 [EV-005]

items.original_text: Pre-finetuned RoBERTa-Large model gets new state-of-the-art on RTE rivaling models an order of magnitude larger than it.
items.claim_text: 预微调RoBERTa-Large在RTE上取得SOTA，媲美比它大一个数量级的模型 [EV-006]

items.original_text: The use of heterogenous batches outperforms other batching strategies by a significant margin.
items.claim_text: 异构批次策略显著优于其他批次策略 [EV-007]

items.original_text: Pre-finetuned models consistently require less data for fine-tuning, demonstrating improved sample efficiency.
items.claim_text: 预微调模型持续需要更少数据进行微调，展示更高的样本效率 [EV-008]

items.original_text: For example, the pre-finetuned RoBERTa-BASE model on RTE improves by close to 9 points, rivaling the RoBERTa-Large accuracy.
items.claim_text: 预微调RoBERTa-Base在RTE上提升近9个点，达到RoBERTa-Large精度 [EV-009]

items.original_text: T5 (Text-To-Text Transfer Transformer) proposes a unified text-to-text framework where all NLP tasks are formulated as text-to-text problems, enabling simple encoder-decoder models to outperform task-specific architectures.
items.claim_text: T5提出统一text-to-text框架，将所有NLP任务格式化为文本输入-文本输出问题 [EV-010]

items.original_text: BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers) pre-trains deep bidirectional transformers using masked language modeling, achieving state-of-the-art results on a wide range of NLU tasks.
items.claim_text: BERT使用掩码语言模型预训练深度双向Transformer，在广泛NLU任务上取得SOTA [EV-011]
